summary: Comprehensive regression + fix verification for earnrm CRM - Iteration 22. CRITICAL FIXES VERIFIED: (1) Login with email/password works, (2) Add new lead works (POST /api/leads), (3) All main pages load without error. CORS uses allow_origin_regex for Safari support. Admin sidebar visible before Settings. Lead detail has all cross-linked actions.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - login with valid credentials (200)
Backend: POST /api/auth/session - endpoint exists, validates session_id
Backend: POST /api/leads - CRITICAL: Create lead works
Frontend: Login page - email/password form works
Frontend: Dashboard - loads with sidebar, stats cards
Frontend: Leads page - Add Lead dialog opens, form submits, lead created (CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED)
Frontend: Leads page - Select All checkbox, bulk Enrich/Delete buttons
Frontend: Lead detail dialog - shows Convert to Contact, Enrich, Draft Email, Add Deal, Add Task, Discuss, Call
Frontend: Contacts page - Add Contact, Import CSV, Select All, bulk delete
Frontend: Deals page - Kanban/List toggle, list view with Select All and bulk delete
Frontend: Tasks page - Kanban board with To Do/In Progress/Done
Frontend: Companies page - shows companies with Add Company
Frontend: Chat page - CHANNELS and LEAD DISCUSSIONS sections
Frontend: Calls page - Schedule Call button, stats (4 Scheduled)
Frontend: Settings page - 6 tabs (Profile, Organization, Team & Invites, Billing & Invoices, Integrations, Mobile App)
Frontend: Admin page - 7 tabs including Data Explorer, Admin link visible in sidebar before Settings

safari_google_login.evidence: CORS uses allow_origin_regex=r'https?://.*' instead of wildcard '*'. AuthCallback checks both hash and query params for session_id. Cannot fully test Safari OAuth without Safari browser.

evidence: Playwright test: filled form, clicked submit, dialog closed, toast 'Lead added successfully' shown
New lead TEST_PlaywrightLead appeared in list

session_endpoint_token.evidence: POST /api/auth/session returns token field (jwt_token) for Google OAuth sessions

admin_sidebar_fix.evidence: Admin link visible in sidebar before Settings for super_admin user

scrollable_dialogs.evidence: DialogContent has max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto in dialog.jsx

lead_cross_linked_actions.evidence: Lead detail shows: Convert to Contact, Enrich, Draft Email, Add Deal, Add Task, Discuss buttons

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages verified, critical Add Lead flow working)

seed_data_creation: Test lead 'TEST_PlaywrightLead TestSurname' created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical fixes verified: (1) CORS uses allow_origin_regex for Safari support, (2) POST /api/leads works - Add Lead bug FIXED, (3) Admin sidebar visible before Settings, (4) Lead detail has all cross-linked actions. All 23 backend tests pass. Safari Google login fix cannot be fully tested without Safari browser but CORS config is correct.
